title: HOT WEATHER INFORMATION - 211info
text: TRILLIUM COMMUNITY HEALTH PLAN HOT WEATHER INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about local hot weather events and sign-ups for community alerts. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (541) 485-2155 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 485-2155 Toll-free (877) 600-5472 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County and City of Reedsport, and zip codes 97446 (Linn County only) Services: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
